name: Grilled Chicken Breasts with Salad
recipeInstructions:
------------------------SALAD-----------------------------
sm Radicchio
sm Butterhead Lettuce
md Belgian Endive
2 tbsp Dry red wine
2 tbsp Olive oil
1 tbsp Balsamic vinegar
1/2 cup Salsa (purchased or homemade)
1. Remove skin from chicken breasts and discard.
Whisk together red wine, olive oil, balsamic vinegar,
garlic, oregano, salt, and pepper in a shallow bowl
large enough to hold the chicken breasts. Add the
chicken breasts and marinate for 30 minutes, turning
the chicken every 10 minutes.
2. Heat grill to medium hot. Grill chicken 4 to 6
minutes on each side or until no longer pink inside.
3. Wash radicchio, lettuce, and endive; pat dry. Cut
greens into long strips and place in a medium bowl.
Combine red wine, olive oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper
in a small bowl and whisk until smooth. Pour over
salad greens and toss lightly.
4. To serve, divide salad greens among 4 plates and
place a grilled chicken breast on top. Garnish with
salsa. Makes 4 servings.
